3065420.name: Trainz 2022 DLC - Model Trainz: Chicago
3065420.description:
Come on over and run some trains in Chicago!


Model Trainz: Chicago is a Chicago themed layout featuring industrial switching and Metra commuter operations along with a staging yard for starting and ending operations. Some ideas from the previous N scale layout are including selecting certain Metra station names from their 11 lines currently to name all six stations.
Each section is its own separate area having a suburb theme that is still within the Chicagoland area. Each area has its own industries that needs to be switched out.

Want to have a real operating session? Invite your friends to the virtual basement using the included Multiplayer session!

Developed by Hiawathamr Trainz Add-ons
3065420.supported_languages: 英语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 俄语, 法语, 德语
